narrative_arc: heroine is already mid-transformation (boots/suit shredding) -> grows past house then city-block scale, wrecking street & onlookers, briefly crushing/embracing male partner -> levels city blocks (truck flees) -> magic book reappears and channels lightning, re-igniting growth -> dwarfs Earth, reaches the moon -> ascends into deep space -> ends godlike, plucking/crushing/consuming whole galaxies (open-ended, to be continued)

panels.notes: Title cover. Blonde heroine, glowing white eyes, smug grin, cradling Earth in her palm against a starfield. Logo 'THE MYSTERIOUS BOOK / Ascension'. Credits: Art by Boogie, Story by Gribble, GrowGetterComics.com. Scale-contrast (whole planet in hand) sets the chapter's cosmic-size promise.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; single-image cover, establishes godlike scale + creator credits.

panels.notes: Wide letterboxed top strip: black boots/feet bursting apart on cracking rock, debris flying. Pure clothing/footwear-destruction money shot, no face. Sells growth via SFX + shattering boots.
Tight low-angle CU of heroine's grinning upturned face, eyes rolled up in pleasure. Face carries the growth ecstasy.
Black bodysuit tearing off swelling lats/shoulders; fist clenched. Clothing-destruction zoom on the back.

Wide bottom panel: suit shredding off the torso, breasts spilling free, head thrown back open-mouthed. Dialogue 'AHHN...' / 'OH YEAH'. Peak-pleasure face + clothing-destruction; the page's payoff beat.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=0; opening page drops us straight into active transformation. Strong clothing/footwear-destruction + sfx-driven growth, expressive faces.

panels.notes: Full-page montage: a vertical stack of four progressively LARGER/lighter versions of the figure rising through clouds (a dark small one at bottom up to a huge pale laughing one at top), yellow energy ribbons threading between. Dialogue 'HAHAHA...'. A single-page multi-panel-progressive growth ladder rendered as one composition; size-comparison against the prior selves.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; clever in-panel progressive-growth stack (4 escalating copies). Reads as the transformation's 'stages' montage.

panels.notes: Splash: heroine restored to a white toga + gold belt, arms raised in a victory-V, towering above suburban rooftops with a radiant orange sunburst behind. Low-hero worm's-eye looking up the massive thighs. Establishes she is now bigger than houses; size-comparison to rooftops/trees.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; hero splash, full-body reveal of the new mid-stage scale against suburbia.

panels.notes: Heroine strides forward crushing a rock pile, suburban street receding behind. Big yellow 'KRAKASHH' SFX. Strong depth + diagonal stride.
Tall right-hand panel: full standing figure hands-on-hips, chin up, looking down at the viewer. 'FWOOSH' rising energy. Confident posture.
Her huge hand grabs the roof of a red car (scale-contrast: hand vs car). No face. Sets up the car-crush gag.
She crushes the car against her body, sly side-eye grin. 'CRUUSH' impact star. Playful destruction beat.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=0; good size-comparison via car-crush; strong sfx. Dialogue balloons are blank (lettering stripped/raw scans).

panels.notes: Tall left panel: heroine flexing a bicep, chest swelling, sly grin. Radiating speed-lines. Heartbeat-style 'BUDUMP' growth pulse.
Profile of her upper body facing off-panel figures; OTS toward small people at right edge. Transition to onlooker subplot.
Small bespectacled man (the partner) looks up between her giant gold-cuffed wrists; scale-contrast big-FG-body vs tiny man.
High angle down on the man sprawled on the ground amid spilled groceries, looking up in alarm. High-vuln framing.
Her giant fingers reach down toward him. Tension beat. (Blank balloons.)

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=0; introduces the small male partner for size-contrast and reaction-intercut. Good vulnerability/high-angle on the human.

panels.notes: CU of the grinning bespectacled man (now apparently delighted rather than scared).
Heroine smiles and raises a finger ('SNAP'), toga still on, against blue sky. Conversational beat.
High wide: her enormous backside fills frame while the tiny man stands far below on the ground. Strong scale-contrast.
Heroine gestures, breast exposed as toga slips; energy hum 'ZZZRRMMM'.
Plain eye-level CU of the man gesturing as he talks. The one genuinely flat, static beat on the page.
Small inset of the man at her feet, low angle. Dialogue page (balloons blank), pace slows for exposition.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=1 (p5); the chapter's only real dialogue/buildup lull. No active growth here; banter between the giantess and partner.

panels.notes: The MALE partner has now ALSO grown huge and muscular, hands on hips, towering in clouds. Secondary transformation begins.
His shirt rips off ('GRASSH') as he and the heroine grapple/embrace; clothing-destruction on the male.
The two muscular bodies press together, 'KKRUSH'. Mutual-growth clinch.
Wide bottom: the pair embracing amid rubble/rooftops, her head thrown back 'AHHHN...'. Pleasure beat.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=0; pivot to a SECOND simultaneous transformation (the male partner). Clothing-destruction + sfx maintained.

panels.notes: High diagonal of the two huge bodies entangled in the rubble. Wet SFX. Action staged on a strong rake.
CU of a startled onlooker (white man).
CU of a second startled onlooker (Black man). Reaction-intercut pair; both framed flat/level.
Wide high diagonal: the giant couple sprawled across the wrecked street, a police cruiser arriving at frame edge.
Thin strip: police arriving with cars/cones. Subplot escalation (authorities respond).

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=2 (the two onlooker CUs are deliberately plain reaction beats); good reaction-intercut and arriving-police escalation.

panels.notes: High diagonal of the heroine's broad muscled back swelling, tiny partner clutched against her. Back-focus growth + scale.
Couple entwined across the rubble, police lights below. Sustained raked staging.
Thin establishing strip: a line of police/barricades and squad cars way below the giants. Pulls back for scale.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3 (EWS/WS); flat_panel_count=0; uses an EWS to establish how small the authorities are. Panel 3 read as a single wide strip (merged sub-beats).

panels.notes: Top-left: a cluster of armed police firing up at the giants (stylized gunfire SFX), her huge body looming. Authorities now attack.
Tall right panel: heroine seen from below, back rippling, the tiny man on her shoulder. Bullets do nothing. Low-hero power framing.
Couple embracing, heads back, against a purple energy field.
Two cops at right look up uneasily. Reaction beat; framed fairly flat/level.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=1; the 'bullets are useless' invulnerability beat. Stylized gunfire SFX add texture.

panels.notes: Heroine flexes a bicep by her face, huge breasts and abs foregrounded, tiny partner tucked at her chest. Bicep-flex money shot.
She throws both arms up, chest/abs surging ('FACOMP'). Double-bicep growth flex.
High wide: the tiny dark silhouette of the man stands on rubble far below her towering body. Strong scale-contrast.
She powers upward against a red field, big yellow 'KRAKOOM' lightning bolt. Re-ignition of growth; transitions to the city-leveling arc.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=0; back-to-back flex money shots + a scale-contrast wide. KRAKOOM bridges into the next escalation.

panels.notes: Narrow left ECU strip: a clenched fist/forearm, veins/striations popping ('SHRRR'). Detail growth-focus.
Heroine (toga re-formed) clenches both fists, gritted grin, pecs/arms flexing. Strain face sells the surge.
Big right-hand panel: she stands over a smoking trail of FLATTENED houses/rubble stretching to the horizon. City-destruction reveal; size-comparison against the leveled neighborhood.
Bottom row beat 1 of 3: she holds up a small object (a snapped wristband?), sly look. Near-identical framing to the next two.
Bottom row beat 2 of 3: same pose against orange burst, laughing. Repeats framing.
Bottom row beat 3 of 3: same pose, pink field. Three near-identical MCUs in a row = a flat triptych lull mid-page.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=4 (ECU..WS); flat_panel_count=3 (the bottom triptych p4-6 repeats the same MCU pose). Top half is dynamic (ECU detail + city-destruction WS); bottom triptych is the page's weak, static stretch.

panels.notes: Big top panel: low worm's-eye looking up her enormous backside as she bursts up through a building/parking structure, tiny terrified man and pillars in FG. Cackling 'HAHAHAHA'. Bold scale + foreshortening; the page's standout.
Right side: two bystanders (a man, a blonde woman) recoil in alarm. Reaction-intercut.
Bottom row 1/3: heroine throws a punch toward camera ('THOOOM'), fierce face. Foreshortened fist.
Bottom row 2/3: she smashes up through more structure, debris exploding ('BRAKOOM'). Destruction beat.
Bottom row 3/3: she rises triumphant from the wreckage in a cloud ('TADUUMM'). Bigger again.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=0; excellent escalation page: worm's-eye scale, foreshortened punch, three impact SFX, reaction-intercut. Strong sfx-driven destruction.

panels.notes: Top-left: heroine bursts through a rocky cliff/wall ('KATHOOM'). Now mountain-scale.
Top-right: a blue semi-truck flees down a road as her giant legs loom; driver leans out. Size-comparison vs a highway truck.
Mid strip: she stomps/blasts the road, fiery explosions ('KRAKOOM','BOOOM'). City-wrecking.
Bottom-left: low-hero of her surging upward through smoke ('TAGOOOM'). Growing again.
Bottom-right: CU of her gritted, strained face crackling with energy ('KZZZTTT'). Strain sells the surge.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=4 (EWS..CU); flat_panel_count=0; relentless SFX wall (KATHOOM/KRAKOOM/BOOOM/TAGOOOM). Truck size-comparison is a clean gauge of her new scale. Panel 5 read as one beat (energy CU).

panels.notes: Top: her arm/torso sweep across an entire downtown SKYLINE; police tape strung in FG. She now rivals skyscrapers; multiple destruction SFX. Big size-comparison to a city.
Mid strip: heroine reclines/gestures over the smoking city, cloud of dust. Gloating beat.
Bottom-left: low-hero full figure crackling with yellow energy arcs ('ZA ZA ZA'), abs flexed. Electric power-up.
Bottom-right: tighter, chest/torso surging with electricity, head back in bliss. Peak energy money shot.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3 (EWS/WS/MS); flat_panel_count=0; whole-skyline size-comparison + electric power-up. ZA-ZA energy SFX field is a nice growth texture.

panels.notes: Small top-left inset: the male partner, now huge too, laughing/cheering. Reaction beat (mostly flat).

Dominant splash: worm's-eye up the heroine standing astride/over a whole city grid that recedes far below, fists clenched, 'KABOOM'. Full-body reveal of her city-dwarfing peak scale. The page's showpiece.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=1 (inset); the near-splash worm's-eye-over-the-city is one of the strongest scale compositions in the book.

panels.notes: Top: the heroine (now reddish/auburn hair) hovers bicep-flexing above a vast canyon/rift, energy at her fist ('KATHOOM'). Earth-rending scale; full-body.
Bottom: closer on her torso wreathed in lightning ('FRVSHH'), abs/quads flexed, blissful. The 'FRVSHH' energy field recurs as the cosmic-tier growth SFX.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; transition into the cosmic tier (hair shifts auburn, ground splits, lightning aura). Strong low-hero.

panels.notes: Top: heroine laughing, torso crackling with energy, hand on her chest. Electric growth beat.

Bottom: she looks up wide-eyed at the floating MAGIC BOOK (gold cover, all-seeing-eye glyph) that has reappeared and is feeding her power. Re-introduces the title object as the engine of the ascension.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; pivotal reveal that the book itself is driving the growth. Awe face on the book is well-judged.

panels.notes: Top: she holds the tiny glowing book up beside her now-enormous chest, grinning. Scale-contrast (book vs body) shows how big she has become.
Bottom: she clutches the book to herself, surrounded by blue lightning bolts ('KRZZT'), face fierce/glowing. Power channels at maximum.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; the book-as-power-source channeling peak. KRZZT lightning ring is strong sfx-driven energy.

panels.notes: Left column 1/3: CU of her hand holding the glowing book over her breast. Detail beat.
Left column 2/3: same framing, book now sparkling brighter. Near-identical repeat.
Left column 3/3: the book now spent/closing, gold sparks rising. The 3-panel stack is a small progressive beat but uses identical framing (mild flat repeat).

Big right panel: full-figure low-hero of the heroine descending toward a crater on a mountain plateau, hair streaming, ripped/godlike. Full-body reveal of the post-book form. Inset bottom-right begins a tight eyes ECU.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2 (CU/WS); flat_panel_count=0 (the left triptych is a deliberate small progressive sequence on the book, not a conversation lull); strong full-body low-hero on the right.

panels.notes: Top: ECU of her green eyes blazing, brow furrowed, hair whipping. Pure intensity close-up.
Bottom: low-angle CU, head thrown back, mouth wide in a scream/laugh against a radiant green burst, swelling chest below. Peak-intensity face; the emotional crescendo of the transformation.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2 (ECU/CU); flat_panel_count=0; an entire page devoted to FACE — eyes ECU then open-mouthed scream. Best expression-intensity beat in the book.

panels.notes: Splash: the heroine, now COSMIC scale, floats in space punching/cracking a moon-like body, planet Earth huge behind her, debris ('CRUNCH'). She has outgrown the planet. Massive size-comparison (vs Earth & moon).

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; the chapter's scale pivot to space. Earth-as-backdrop size-comparison is the single biggest 'how big is she now' gauge.

panels.notes: Splash: rear three-quarter of the heroine flexing a back-double-bicep in deep space, a ringed planet/black-hole and nebula swirls around her. Back/glute money shot at cosmic scale; size-comparison vs a whole planet.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; full-body cosmic flex from behind. Establishes she now dwarfs planets.

panels.notes: Splash: low-hero looking up her colossal body, a galaxy/portal glyph (now a different cosmic sigil) glowing at lower right, the Milky Way behind. Grinning down godlike. Full-body cosmic reveal.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; reinforces godlike scale; the magic glyph has evolved from book to cosmic seal.

panels.notes: Splash: dramatic foreshortened high-angle down her crouched/curled cosmic body (back, glutes, soles toward camera) on a purple-lightning starfield. Pin-up-style scale composition; face hidden. 'KRRRA' crackle.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; pure splash spectacle; bold foreshortening but no readable face (intensity n/a).

panels.notes: Splash: the godlike heroine holds an entire PLANET/star aloft in one hand (purple-haloed orb), torso and abs fully cut, looking off with resolve. Echoes the cover. 'Holding a world in her hand' aftermath flex — growth itself has paused; she is now showing off cosmic power.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; aftermath/showcase splash. Growth has crested; this is the 'new god body' display. Counts as aftermath, not active growth.

panels.notes: Splash: she cradles an entire spiral GALAXY between her hands at chest height, grinning down. Scale-contrast (a galaxy is now a handful). Showcase, not active growth.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; 'galaxy in her hands' display splash; the size kink taken to its cosmic limit.

panels.notes: Main splash: full-figure, she holds a galaxy-filled object aloft like a trophy, flexing, laughing. Godlike display.
Inset bottom-right: ECU of her open mouth/tongue as she licks/consumes the dripping galaxy-substance. Transgressive 'devouring a galaxy' beat; peak relish on the face.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2 (WS/ECU); flat_panel_count=0; cosmic display + a deliberately lurid galaxy-consumption inset. Strong face.

panels.notes: Splash: she squeezes/crushes a galaxy orb against her body, head back, blissful, abs and quads fully defined. 'HA HA'. Continued cosmic-power indulgence.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; aftermath indulgence splash; growth static, power on display.

panels.notes: Final splash: the heroine crushes a small bright galaxy/star in her fist against her abs, straining/blissed, hair streaming, large EMPTY black caption bar at top (where a closing line / 'to be continued' would sit). Open, unresolved ending — she is now an unstoppable cosmic being. 'HNGGK'.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; ends on an open cosmic-godhood note (blank closing caption = unresolved pull-forward, but no explicit hook text in this raw scan).

strengths: Growth is the entire spine: 26/31 pages carry active or aftermath transformation content and the book opens already mid-change (P2 boots bursting) with no slow setup tax — exactly the growth-forward ratio the niche rewards.

Relentless, well-varied SFX do the heavy lifting for the growth SENSATION with almost no dialogue: P2 CRACK/RIPPP/FACOMP (clothing+body), P14 THOOOM/BRAKOOM/TADUUMM (impact), P15-16 KATHOOM/KRAKOOM/BOOOM/TAGOOOM (city-leveling), P18-20 FRVSHH/KRZZT (cosmic energy). The escalating SFX vocabulary is a steal-worthy template for sfx-driven growth.

Continuous size-comparison gauges keep the scale legible as it ramps: hand-vs-car (P5), body-vs-tiny-partner (P6,P12), body-vs-truck (P15), body-vs-skyline (P16-17), body-vs-Earth/moon (P23), body-vs-galaxy (P28-29). Each new ceiling is re-anchored against a fixed real-world reference.

P3 stacks four progressively larger copies of the figure into ONE composition (a single-page progressive-growth ladder) — an efficient way to show transformation 'stages' without spending four panels.

P22 spends a whole page on the FACE (eyes ECU -> open-mouthed scream on a green burst), and P2/P16/P18 throw the head back in growth-ecstasy — the climactic beats reliably get a high-intensity face rather than a dead one.

Bold scale staging on the showpieces: worm's-eye up the backside bursting through a parking structure (P14p1), worm's-eye standing over the whole city grid (P17p2), and the Earth-backdrop space splash (P23). These are the dynamic-camera wins to emulate.
Two simultaneous transformations (heroine + male partner, P8-12) add variety and a built-in reaction/scale partner without introducing background extras.
weaknesses: Lettering is essentially absent from these scans — speech balloons are BLANK on nearly every dialogue beat (P5, P6, P7, P9, P12, P23-31 all have empty bubbles/captions). Story intent is unreadable; the chapter coasts almost entirely on spectacle, and the final page's closing caption bar is empty so there is no explicit cliffhanger TEXT.

The bottom triptych on P13 (panels 4-6) is three near-identical MCUs of the same pose against three colored backgrounds — a flat, static stretch that kills the page's momentum after a strong dynamic top half. Same mild repeat on P21's left column (three identical book CUs).

Camera defaults hard to low-hero/worm's-eye: it is used effectively but on virtually EVERY page, so the 'tower over the viewer' angle stops reading as special by the cosmic act. Almost no high/aerial coverage except the human-reaction beats (P6p4, P7p3).

The space-act splash run P23-31 is nine consecutive single-image splashes with no panel grid and no SFX-or-dialogue progression between most of them — spectacular but repetitive pacing; several (P24, P25, P26, P30) are interchangeable 'big body in space' pin-ups that don't advance any beat.

Story/structure is the weakest axis: there is no setup, no stakes, and no antagonist beyond token police who are dispatched off-handedly (P11); the 'plot' is pure escalation of size with the partner and onlookers as set-dressing. Engaging as a growth showcase, thin as a narrative.
Reaction/onlooker CUs are framed flat-level and static (P9p2-3 the two bystanders, P7p5, P11p4) — they do their job but are the least cinematic panels and could have been raked or scaled for tension.
